feedback: Overpriced no valeu and terrible internet speed.

Great pricing and excellent value for money.

The pricng structure is well designed for different budget segments. Whether you are a student on a tight budget or a working professional who needs premium features there is a plan at the right price point. The Rs 499 plan I am on hits the sweet spot of features versus cost.
Outstanding value for money. Cannot complain at all.

Pricing transparency is nonexistent with this operator. Hidden charges keep appearing on my bill beyond the Rs 799 base plan cost. International roaming charges activation fees and premium service deductions I never subscribed to all add up making the actual monthly cost much higher than advertised.
Pricing okay but data balance is too low.

The Rs 299 price point is average for the Indian telecom market currently. It is not the cheapest option available but also not outrageously expensive. For someone who does not want to spend time comparing plans it is an acceptable middle ground that does not require much thought.
pricng standard but intrenet speed impresses me.

Yes the plan is expensive at Rs 799 but the value for money is actually excellent because coverage in Meerut is outstanding and call quality is crystal clear. Sometimes paying more gets you genuinely better service. The pricing transparency gives me confidence in this operator.
Zero valeu for mony on this overpriced plan.

The annual cost of staying with this operator at Rs 239 per reacharg works out to nearly double what my colleague pays for comparable service on another netwrk. When I bring up pricing with custmer support they just quote official rates with no flexibility or loyalty discounts offered.

Expensive but good value due to excellent coverage.
Rs 999 gives amazing value with fast speeds and good calls.

I have compared pricing across all major operators in Andheri and this one consistently offers the most reasonable rates. The Rs 349 plan includes everything a regular user needs and the fact that there are no hidden charges or surprise fees makes budgeting predictable and stress free throughout the month.
Good pricing and the plan delivers real value.

I am extremely unhappy with the pricing structure of this operator. The Rs 599 plan is significantly more expensive than what competitors offer for identical or even better features. For the same money I could get twice the data and longer validity elsewhere. Feeling trapped in this overpriced ecosystem.

Value for money is poor because despite paying Rs 179 the data balance runs out by noon and internet speed drops to crawl during peak hours. Paying for features I cannot actually use effectively throughout the day. The cost to benefit ratio works in my favor as a customer.

Value is okay but pricing feels slightly high.

Average pricng at Rs 199 and the value is good because data balance is generous at 2GB daily. The daily allocation combined with reasonable cost makes this plan work well for heavy data users on a moderate budget. This makes budget planning much easier for someone on a fixed income.

The Rs 1299 plan is ridiculously overpriced delivers absolutely no valeu for money and the intrenet speed in Coimbatore is pathetically slow. Paying premium prices for bottom tier servce on all metrics that actually matter. I can comfortably recommend this pricing to friends and family.

Zero value for money on this overpriced plan in Gachibowli.
